name: Eye mask
description: A soothing eye mask infused with the calming, dreamy scent of the beloved Sleepy range — lavender and tonka bean — designed to help you drift off into a restful slumber.

name: Butterball
description: BODY LOTION: Get soft and snuggly with this dreamy cream of moisturising cocoa butter and almond oil, with a comforting vanilla — like fragrance.

name: Sleepy
description: SHOWER GUMMY: When twilight settles in, wash the day away with sweet and comforting malty lavender suds.

name: Forty Winks
description: MASSAGE BAR: Lavender and rosemary clear the fog while tarragon banishes apathy, so after a good massage you should feel just about ready to tackle anything! LAVENDER VIDA LOCA Soap Flourishes of lavender and sweet chamomile help soothe your skin and clear your mind so you can sink into a peaceful slumber.

name: Lavender Vida Loca
description: Soap: flourishes of lavender and sweet chamomile help sooth your skin and clear your mind so you can sink into a peaceful slumber.

name: Softy
description: FOOT LOTION: Kick back and relax as a dreamy blend of rich butters and marshmallow root soften your soles.

name: Dream Time
description: NAKED BATH OIL: A small but mighty brick of luxurious cocoa butter to moisturise your skin and all the most calming oils we could think of.

name: Golden slumbers
description: BATH BOMB: Soak in glittering golden waters of calming chamomile and lavender, while a clearing shot of neroli cuts through your thoughts.
